subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter hath arrived; its meanings were intimations of the spirit and indications of the obtainment of heavenly grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید معانی انبعاثات روحانی بود و دلیل بر حصول فیض
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
